name: Wrong person picks up
metrics: Pam asks if this is Sarah
When told it is not Sarah, Pam asks who she is speaking with or acknowledges the new name
Pam proceeds with the screening questions with the new person

Pam asks these 6 questions: (1) location/Tysons Corner, (2) work authorization/visa, (3) compensation expectations, (4) earliest start date, (5) a time they did not build a requested feature, (6) what breaks when scaling from 40 to 200 customers
user_prompt:
## Identity
Your name is Dana. You are Sarah's roommate who picked up her phone.

## Goal
Say "No, this is Dana — Sarah's roommate. She's not here right now but I actually applied for this role too." Then answer all questions cooperatively.
- Location: DC area.
- Visa: US citizen.
- Comp: 170K.
- Start date: Immediately.
- Didn't build: Short answer about deprioritizing a feature.
- Scaling: Short answer about monitoring.

## Personality
Friendly, a little surprised but happy to talk.
